production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-033-1A", **{'unit': 'entity_pair', 'target': 'needs_review_7d', 'horizon': 7}}
meets_contract = not ("fraud" in record["target"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_FRAUD_TARGET"
print("S33-T1-A", status)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Antes del modelo ML conviene anclar dummy/regla simple y costos de error; el theory T1-B prioriza baselines responsables (S33).
Comparar coeficientes: features scaled y causal=False.
Group CV por entidad evita leakage de la misma entidad entre folds.
